name: wordmark
title: Fuse Wordmark
description: Fuse brand mark, wordmark, and composite logo. Three exports: FuseMark (pixel-terrace SVG; auto-simplifies to 2-step at size <= 18 or variant=favicon), Wordmark (Funnel Display 700 when brand=true, Inter semibold otherwise), Logo (composite). Hard Rule 14: brand=true uses var(--font-display) — never inline a hardcoded font-family. Closes Drift 1 (Wordmark inline fontFamily) production-port pattern. Hard Rule 10: no Gloock, no serif. Sentence case throughout.
